label: Ritual outcome comp (participants with tag)
description: Scores quality based on the number of participants that have a specific ritual tag set, evaluated via a curve.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Not used directly; quality is computed from the curve.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: SimpleCurve mapping the count of tagged participants (X) to quality offset (Y).

tag.label: Tag
tag.description: Ritual participant tag string; participants with this tag count toward the score.
